parents.subject: LU-5102 utils: Look for modules in $LUSTRE/utils/.libs

commit.subject: LU-4621 ofd: debug patch
commit.message:
LU-4621 ofd: debug patch

debug patch to check the replay of creation request from OSP,
to make sure whether there is less objects created when replaying.

Change-Id: I42d7d0f044c4c8a099b6791c31a73b7a48af19b7
Signed-off-by: Hongchao Zhang <hongchao.zhang@intel.com>
Test-Parameters: envdefinitions=SLOW=yes clientdistro=el6 \
clientarch=x86_64 serverarch=x86_64 clientcount=4 osscount=2 mdscount=2 \
austeroptions=-R failover=true useiscsi=true testlist=recovery-mds-scale
